note: Template: one row per (checkpoint, benchmark). exposure_status defaults to 'unknown'; each row is filled and reviewer-signed at Phase 0 before the lock. exposure primarily qualifies absolute released-guard rankings and vendor-generalization language; the controlled SFT-U and KL-SFT-U deltas remain valid effects on the fixed rows (proposal Section 7.2).

exposure_status_semantics.documented_training_or_derivative: the checkpoint's training or a derivative used this benchmark
exposure_status_semantics.constructionally_related_or_home_benchma: benchmark is constructionally related or a home benchmark for this checkpoint
exposure_status_semantics.documented_author_evaluation: checkpoint authors documented evaluating on this benchmark
exposure_status_semantics.no_documented_overlap: no documented overlap; explicitly NOT proof of cleanliness
exposure_status_semantics.chronologically_post_pinned_weights: benchmark published/collected after the pinned weights
